mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_product (product_code, product_name, category_id, category_name, spec, unit, cost_price, sale_price, min_stock, max_stock, is_enabled, remark, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{productCode}, #{productName}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{spec}, #{unit}, #{costPrice}, #{salePrice}, #{minStock}, #{maxStock}, #{isEnabled}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_product SET product_name = #{productName}, category_id = #{categoryId}, category_name = #{categoryName}, spec = #{spec}, unit = #{unit}, cost_price = #{costPrice}, sale_price = #{salePrice}, min_stock = #{minStock}, max_stock = #{maxStock}, is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE biz_product SET is_deleted = true, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
